data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an 'Equipment on-site log' as part of the reporting requirements. However, the provided evidence does not include any mention or details regarding the implementation of this specific log, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case outlines various needs for the construction site report but fails to explicitly confirm the existence of an equipment log, which is critical for fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an 'Equipment on-site log' being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
